differential_diagnoses: Hypersensitivity pneumonitis with severe pulmonary hypertension
Connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease
next_steps: Perform open lung biopsy (gold standard for PVOD/PCH diagnosis)
Discontinue or cautiously reduce epoprostenol due to high risk of pulmonary edema in PVOD/PCH
Perform genetic testing for biallelic EIF2AK4 mutations
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage and transbronchial biopsy if surgical biopsy is delayed
Continue supportive care with diuretics and oxygen
